description: The trees begin to thin out. To the south, you can see the shimmering horizon of the Electric Desert. The air is starting to feel warm and static-charged, but the path forward seems blocked by a dense, tangled thicket of shoelaces.

wall.description: The last few shoelace trees of the forest.

ground.description: The ground is becoming more sandy and dry.

exit_north.description: The path leads back into the deep forest.

exit_south.description: The shimmering heat of the Electric Desert is visible, but a massive barrier of tangled shoelaces prevents you from going south. There must be another way around.

exit_east.description: The path leads east toward the marshy edge of the forest.

exit_west.description: The path leads west toward a small creek.
